markdownRemark.html:
At Sāvatthī.

“Mendicants, when a gentleman has gone forth out of faith, this is what’s in line with the teachings. They should live observing not-self in form, feeling, perception, choices, and consciousness. … They’re freed from suffering, I say.”

SN.22.150. Ajjhatta Sutta (“In Oneself”)

children.value: “Mendicants, when a gentleman has gone forth out of faith, this is what’s in line with the teachings. They should live observing not-self in form, feeling, perception, choices, and consciousness. … They’re freed from suffering, I say.”
